macros.title: Hypertension
macros.description:
Blood pressure readings reviewed and assessed for accuracy and trend.
Hypertension evaluated based on current guidelines, comorbid conditions, and cardiovascular risk factors.
Lifestyle modifications including diet, exercise, and sodium restriction discussed.
Medication therapy reviewed and adjusted as clinically indicated.
Patient educated on home blood pressure monitoring and follow-up recommendations.

macros.title: Depression
macros.description:
Mood, sleep, appetite, and energy reviewed.
PHQ-9 administered and scored.
Safety screening completed including suicidal ideation and self-harm.
Pharmacotherapy and psychotherapy options discussed.
Follow-up plan and crisis resources provided.

macros.title: Male Hormone Replacement Therapy Overview
macros.description:
Symptoms of hypogonadism reviewed including fatigue, libido, and mood.
Lab results reviewed including total and free testosterone.
Risks, benefits, and alternatives to TRT discussed.
Monitoring plan including hematocrit, PSA, and lipid panel established.
Informed consent documented.

macros.title: Semaglutide Initiation Protocol
macros.description:
Indication confirmed and contraindications reviewed.
Starting dose, titration schedule, and injection technique reviewed.
GI side effects and management strategies discussed.
Labs ordered including HbA1c and renal function.
Follow-up scheduled in 4 weeks.

macros.title: Semaglutide Treatment Start Guide
macros.description:
Patient counseled on weekly dosing schedule.
Device handling and storage instructions reviewed.
Dietary guidance provided to minimize nausea.
Warning signs requiring contact with the clinic explained.
Dose escalation reviewed.

macros.title: Semaglutide Patient Start Instructions
macros.description:
Step-by-step injection instructions demonstrated.
Site rotation and needle disposal reviewed.
Missed dose protocol explained.
Hydration and meal timing recommendations given.
Patient questions addressed.

macros.title: Semaglutide Introduction for Patients
macros.description:
Mechanism of action explained in plain language.
Expected timeline for results reviewed.
Common vs serious side effects clarified.
Lifestyle co-interventions encouraged.
Written materials provided.

macros.title: Semaglutide Initial Treatment Steps
macros.description:
Baseline weight, BMI, and waist circumference recorded.
Dietary and activity baseline assessed.
Goals collaboratively set with the patient.
First dose administered and tolerance documented.
Safety follow-up arranged.

macros.title: Semaglutide Start-Up Guidelines
macros.description:
Prescribing checklist completed.
Prior authorization and pharmacy coordination addressed.
Patient education materials distributed.
Return appointment scheduled.
Documentation of consent completed.

macros.title: Semaglutide Kickoff Plan
macros.description:
30/60/90-day milestones outlined.
Self-monitoring expectations described.
Nutrition and exercise recommendations issued.
Escalation triggers defined.
Communication plan with the care team established.

macros.title: Semaglutide Start Checklist
macros.description:
Eligibility verified.
Labs reviewed.
Patient education completed.
Prescription sent.
Follow-up booked.

macros.title: Semaglutide Patient Onboarding Guide
macros.description:
Welcome packet delivered.
App and tracking tools introduced.
Support hotline number provided.
FAQs reviewed.
Next steps documented.

macros.title: Type 2 Diabetes Management
macros.description:
HbA1c trend and glucose logs reviewed.
Medication adherence and side effects assessed.
Diet, activity, and weight management discussed.
Foot, eye, and renal screening status checked.
Individualized targets and follow-up plan agreed upon.

macros.title: Annual Wellness Visit
macros.description:
Personal and family history updated.
Preventive screenings reviewed and ordered as indicated.
Vaccination status reviewed.
Depression and cognitive screening completed.
Health maintenance plan documented.

macros.title: Smoking Cessation Counseling
macros.description:
Pack-year history and readiness to quit assessed.
Behavioral and pharmacologic options reviewed.
Quit date set collaboratively.
Referral to cessation program offered.
Follow-up arranged.

macros.title: Anxiety Disorder Screening
macros.description:
GAD-7 administered and scored.
Functional impact assessed.
Differential diagnosis considered.
Stepped-care options discussed.
Referral and safety plan provided as needed.

macros.title: PHQ-9 Depression Assessment
macros.description:
PHQ-9 score documented.
Severity-tier-specific recommendations provided.
Safety screen completed.
Treatment plan including therapy and medication discussed.
Follow-up timing confirmed.

macros.title: Pre-Op Cardiac Risk Assessment
macros.description:
Functional capacity assessed.
RCRI calculated.
Medications reconciled with anesthesia hold instructions.
Labs and EKG reviewed.
Clearance status communicated to surgical team.

macros.title: Postpartum Follow-Up Visit
macros.description:
Mood and sleep assessed including PPD screen.
Lactation, contraception, and recovery reviewed.
Vital signs and exam documented.
Social supports and resources discussed.
Next appointment scheduled.

macros.title: Pediatric Well-Child Check
macros.description:
Growth and development reviewed.
Immunizations administered per schedule.
Anticipatory guidance delivered.
Screenings completed (vision, hearing, lead as indicated).
Caregiver questions addressed.
